text: The department shall have its statewide headquarters office in Austin.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.203 — Department Office

The department shall have its statewide headquarters office in Austin.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1171, Sec. 1.07, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The department shall have its statewide headquarters office in Austin.
